void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:replace="replace" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero EnDe MD5Hex Md5UniCode ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion myext replace rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <AccountInfoRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/ErrorCode"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/ErrorMsg"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <AccountCcy> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/AccountCcy"></xsl:value-of> </AccountCcy> <AccountBalance> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/AccountBalance"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalance> <AccountBalanceAvaliable> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/AccountBalanceAvaliable"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalanceAvaliable> <AccountBranchOpen> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/AccountBranchOpen"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBranchOpen> <AccountName> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/AccountName"></xsl:value-of> </AccountName> <CustomerID> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/CustomerID"></xsl:value-of> </CustomerID> <DepositTerm> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/DepositTerm"></xsl:value-of> </DepositTerm> <InterestRate> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/InterestRate"></xsl:value-of> </InterestRate> <StartDate> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/StartDate"></xsl:value-of> </StartDate> <RollOver> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/RollOver"></xsl:value-of> </RollOver> <MaturityDate> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/MaturityDate"></xsl:value-of> </MaturityDate> <WithholdingTax> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/WithholdingTax"></xsl:value-of> </WithholdingTax> <InterestAferTax> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/InterestAferTax"></xsl:value-of> </InterestAferTax> <phoneNumber> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/phoneNumber"></xsl:value-of> </phoneNumber> <AccountType> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountInfoRp/AccountType"></xsl:value-of> </AccountType> </AccountInfoRp> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="AccountInfoRp"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorMsg" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountCcy" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="AccountBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountBalanceAvaliable" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountBranchOpen" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CustomerID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="DepositTerm" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="InterestRate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="StartDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="RollOver" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="MaturityDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="WithholdingTax" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="InterestAferTax" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="phoneNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountType" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="AccountInfoRp"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorMsg" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountCcy" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="AccountBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountBalanceAvaliable" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountBranchOpen" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CustomerID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="DepositTerm" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="InterestRate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="StartDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="RollOver" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="MaturityDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="WithholdingTax" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="InterestAferTax" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="phoneNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountType" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
